$comment: This is an IIOS deployment manifest, not Hermes' native config format (same distinction as deploy/hermes/profiles/ict-trading.profile.json — see docs/31_HERMES_DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE.md section 15). Git is the authoritative source. No native Hermes config.yaml is generated by this task (docs/32_ONYX_EXECUTIVE_ORCHESTRATOR_SPEC.md section 7 — materialization is future work, not implemented here). NOTE: this manifest's path convention (/srv/iios/profiles/onyx/) differs from deploy/hermes/'s existing /opt/hermes/profiles/ convention used by the ict-trading profile — that inconsistency is preserved as literally specified by the Owner and flagged for reconciliation before real implementation, not silently changed.
brain_registry_ref: BRAIN-COO (docs/BRAIN_REGISTRY.md) — ONYX is the persistent-agent operationalization of the already-specified COO Brain entry, not a second/duplicate Brain
agent_registry_ref: AGENT-ONYX (docs/AGENT_REGISTRY.md) — distinct from and narrower-scoped than AGENT-ORCHESTRATOR, which remains subordinate directly to Governance for approved-objective decomposition
